title: Girl of Ipanema
writer: Eduardo Coutinho, Leon Hirszman, Glauber Rocha
actors: Márcia Rodrigues, Adriano Reys, Arduíno Colassanti
plot: Chronicles the life of a 17 year-old girl living in the upper-class Rio de Janeiro neighbourhood of Ipanema. Márcia lives a life of parties and spend her days among bohemians, musicians and intellectuals. While seeming happy in th...
